title: StartServiceRequest
description: Sent by the server to a station to start a service on a specific bay.

sessionId.description: Unique identifier for this service session.

bayId.description: Identifier of the bay where the service will run.

serviceId.description: Identifier of the service program to start.

durationSeconds.description: Authorized duration of the service in seconds.

reservationId.description: Associated reservation identifier, if the bay was pre-reserved.
